{{Expand}}

{{Infobox artifact
| name = Forged fruit
| introduced = cradle-01-unsouled
}}

== Unsouled ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-01-unsouled|The [[Forged fruit]] is a transparent crystal flask containing a fruit.<ref name="cradle-01-unsouled-c2">''Unsouled'', chapter 2</ref>}}

== Notes ==
<references />

{{Cradle nav}}

[[Category:Artifacts]]
[[Category:Unsouled]]
[[Category:Cradle]]
[[Category:Cradle artifacts]]
